reason: The tweet quotes a Quranic verse (8:16) about military retreat and battlefield conduct, which is commonly used by ISIS to condemn those who flee from battle and to encourage fighting. This specific verse is frequently cited in ISIS propaganda.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
Politics and Current Events -> Extremism and Radical Ideologies
original_post: (ومن يولهم يومئذ دبره إلا متحرفا لقتال أو متحيزا إلى فئة فقد باء بغضب من الله ومأواه جهنم وبئس المصير) [الأنفال16]vo6
